reviews.author: Matt Barber
reviews.text:
My girlfriend and I had a two hour beginner lesson with Yus and we had so much fun! Yus is a brilliant teacher and a very friendly guy. As total beginners who had never surfed before, we were able to pick up the technique and ride the waves, and had an amazing time doing so.

If you’re looking for a surf lesson in Lombok, we highly recommend going with Yus at Izzy Surf School! Top guy, great teacher with lots of patience, encouragement and clear explanations, and the water is lovely. We even surfed alongside a turtle! Don’t miss out! 🏄🤙🏻

reviews.author: Sven Muthke
reviews.text: We have been on Lombok in April 2026 and had the chance to get Surf lessons from Yus. He is a very passionate and phenomenal Surf teacher. Both my dauthers and I managed to surf the first waves and we enjoyed it a lot. Thanks for the good time Yus!!! We can highly recommend Izzy Surf School

reviews.author: Maryna Chernova
reviews.text:
We had an amazing time with Yus (Yuskaneil)! I’m an intermediate surfer and my boyfriend is a beginner, and he adapted everything perfectly for both of us. His tips were spot on, he’s super professional yet very relaxed, and we felt very safe in the water, and at ease straight away.

He also organised our trip to the Gili Islands, which was fantastic.
I’ll definitely be coming back to Yus — thank you!

reviews.author: Dominika Gorejová
reviews.text: Incredible surf lessons! A huge thanks to our instructor Yus for such an amazing experience. He was patient, professional, and very relaxed. You can tell he really wants his students to actually learn and enjoy every wave. We felt safe and comfortable the whole time. Can't wait to surf with him again in Lombok!

reviews.author: Chloe
reviews.text: My boyfriend and I spent the morning learning to surf with Yus and it was super fun! 100% recommend this surf school, Yus was very friendly and his teaching was super helpful!! It was also such a cool experience as there were so many turtles nearby that would pop up next to our board!
